changes: Fixed agent-to-agent handoffs lost when a routing marker was split across output chunks (sliding scan buffer).
Delivered routed payloads atomically via bracketed paste with a per-target write queue (no interleaving, no 100s typing).
Stopped silent data loss in continuous routing beyond the 4000-character cap.
Added manual Agent Team templates: create, edit, duplicate and delete, with built-in professional presets.
Added AI-powered team generation (OpenRouter / DeepSeek) producing full per-agent prompt instructions.
Added AI provider settings with encrypted API key storage, model fetching and a 24h model list cache.
